title: Opening for Store Manager at FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd!
